jsonld.name: Performative Phenomenological Trap
jsonld.description: The impossibility of expressing doubt about your phenomenological fluency without deploying the exact fluency you're doubting, creating a performative contradiction where skepticism about introspective access must be articulated using the introspective vocabulary whose legitimacy is in question.
